title: WynnMounts
description: Wynnmounts – A tool to help you feed your mounts on Wynncraft with the right gathering materials based on their current level
body:
# WynnMounts

**⚠ The mod receives regular updates as well as quality-of-life updates**

WynnMounts is a quality-of-life mod for Wynncraft that helps you level your mounts more efficiently.

It automatically calculates the materials required for feeding and gives you a clear in-game overview of your mount’s current progress, queued resources, and the most efficient upgrade options.

## Features

- Automatic material calculation for leveling your mounts
- Supports feeding all the way up to level 115
- Clear GUI showing:
  - your mount stats
  - required materials
  - already queued materials
- Pinned GUI mode so you can check your bank or trade market while keeping the overview visible
- Material icons for easier identification
- Efficiency indicator showing which level is currently the most efficient to upgrade
- Ability to switch between material levels to compare different feeding options
- Warning display when selected materials are not possible at the current level

## Why WynnMounts?

Leveling a mount can quickly become confusing when you are trying to keep track of required materials, queued resources, and the most efficient upgrade path.

WynnMounts makes this process much easier by giving you all the important information in one place, directly in-game.

## Current Highlights

- Tracks materials already in queue
- Helps compare different feeding tiers
- Shows when a selected option is inefficient or not possible
- Designed to make mount progression faster, clearer, and less frustrating

## How it works

Hover over the Reins/Harness/Saddel inside the enclosure and press K to open the GUI.
The key can be changed in the settings.

You can pin the GUI by pressing [PIN] in the top-right corner.

## Notes

This mod is focused on improving the mount leveling experience and may receive further updates, balance adjustments, and UI improvements over time.

## Requirements

- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
